title: UAE to accelerate oil pipeline project to expand ability to bypass Hormuz
summary: The project would vastly expand UAE's ability to bypass the largely ‌shuttered Strait of Hormuz
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
PHOTO

The ​United ⁠Arab Emirates ‌will accelerate construction ​of a new ​oil pipeline to ​double its export capacity ⁠through Fujairah, the government's ​Abu ‌Dhabi media office ⁠said ⁠on Friday ​of ‌a ⁠project that would vastly expand its ability to bypass the largely ‌shuttered Strait of Hormuz.

(Reporting by ⁠Ahmed Elimam, ​Jana Choukeir ​and ‌Youssef Saba Editing ⁠by ​David Goodman )
